offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, failed subscription payment renewals cause cash flow gaps. We alert finance ops instead of manual tracking of payment renewals.
problem: Failed subscription payment renewals leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners

Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
